gist.headline: Watering the greenhouse
gist.blurb: Our automated bot just did its daily rounds, checking on the health and metrics of all the community apps in our greenhouse.
gist.summary: Automated daily update of community app metrics and health checks in the APPS registry.
gist.impact: Keeps the community app showcase up-to-date with the latest usage statistics and health statuses.
gist.visual_concept: The pollinations bee (Polly) and the Monitor Robot checking on a digital garden of apps. The robot is holding a clipboard with a chart to represent metrics, while Polly waters the plants.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky monitor-head robot checking on a digital garden of glowing code-plants. The robot holds a tiny pixelated clipboard with a chart. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, nostalgic but beautiful.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky monitor-head robot checking on a digital garden of glowing code-plants. The robot holds a tiny pixelated clipboard with a chart. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, nostalgic but beautiful.
